signals.headline: SEC Chairman Confirms Regulatory Readiness for Digital Commodity Framework** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
SEC Chairman Confirms Regulatory Readiness for Digital Commodity Framework** | YES | HIGH confidence

SEC Chairman Paul Atkins has confirmed regulatory readiness for the digital commodity framework that reclassified XRP on March 17, signaling enforcement priorities are shifting from litigation to implementation[6].

signals.headline: WisdomTree and Grayscale Spot XRP ETF Filings Clear Final SEC Review** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
WisdomTree and Grayscale Spot XRP ETF Filings Clear Final SEC Review** | YES | HIGH confidence

WisdomTree and Grayscale confirmed their spot XRP ETF filings cleared the final SEC review stage ahead of Q2 2026 decision, joining 21Shares, Franklin Templeton, Bitwise, and Canary in the pending queue[6]. Combined spot XRP ETF AUM now sits at $1 billion with seven spot ETFs holding assets[6].

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Accelerate: $41
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Accelerate: $41.64 Million Weekly Inflow** | YES | HIGH confidence

U.S. spot XRP ETFs recorded $41.64 million in net inflows for the week ending April 16—the largest single-week inflow in three months, representing a 254% jump from the prior week[1]. CoinShares logged $119.6 million in weekly net inflows[6].

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Proceeding in Late April 2026** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Markup Proceeding in Late April 2026** | YES | HIGH confidence

The **CLARITY Act markup is approaching in late April 2026**, aiming to provide permanent regulatory status for digital assets[3]. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has urged Congress to pass the Clarity Act, keeping policy in the foreground[5]. Polymarket prices CLARITY Act passage at 55%[6].
